response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, demonstrated leadership in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, and deep technical breadth across cloud, data, and open-source systems — aligning well with core responsibilities. However, his resume lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and clear metrics around GenAI deployment, which are critical for this staff-level role.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling at re:cinq
Extensive cloud and distributed systems background with AWS, Kubernetes, and high-scale data pipelines
Strong technical leadership and mentorship history through workshops, open-source projects, and cross-team collaboration
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM optimization techniques in work history
Lacks quantifiable evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade AI solutions (mix of web, embedded, and general software roles)
No indication of formal education beyond BS, and no advanced degree in AI/CS to support staff-level GenAI specialization
